title: JustAMod
description:
Custom swords, armor, food, structure(s), recipes for some uncraftable items and more.

It adds STAMINA to the game!
body:
# JustAMod

This mod has many new things such as **swords**, **weapons**, **armors**, **foods**, **structure**(s), **recipes** for nearly all **uncraftable items** and more.

The mod will include much more in the future! 




_Note: This is my very first mod, I'm happy about Feedback!_
